tools.name: achievements.gamesManagementAchievementsReset
tools.description: Resets the achievement with the given ID for the currently authenticated player. This method is only accessible to whitelisted tester accounts for your application.

tools.name: achievements.gamesManagementAchievementsResetAll
tools.description: Resets all achievements for the currently authenticated player for your application. This method is only accessible to whitelisted tester accounts for your application.

tools.name: achievements.gamesManagementAchievementsResetAllForAllPlayers
tools.description: Resets all draft achievements for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console.

tools.name: achievements.gamesManagementAchievementsResetForAllPlayers
tools.description: Resets the achievement with the given ID for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console. Only draft achievements can be reset.

tools.name: achievements.gamesManagementAchievementsResetMultipleForAllPlayers
tools.description: Resets achievements with the given IDs for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console. Only draft achievements may be reset.

tools.name: applications.gamesManagementApplicationsListHidden
tools.description: Get the list of players hidden from the given application. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console.

tools.name: events.gamesManagementEventsReset
tools.description: Resets all player progress on the event with the given ID for the currently authenticated player. This method is only accessible to whitelisted tester accounts for your application.

tools.name: events.gamesManagementEventsResetAll
tools.description: Resets all player progress on all events for the currently authenticated player. This method is only accessible to whitelisted tester accounts for your application.

tools.name: events.gamesManagementEventsResetAllForAllPlayers
tools.description: Resets all draft events for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console.

tools.name: events.gamesManagementEventsResetForAllPlayers
tools.description: Resets the event with the given ID for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console. Only draft events can be reset.

tools.name: events.gamesManagementEventsResetMultipleForAllPlayers
tools.description: Resets events with the given IDs for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console. Only draft events may be reset.

tools.name: players.gamesManagementPlayersHide
tools.description: Hide the given player's leaderboard scores from the given application. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console.

tools.name: players.gamesManagementPlayersUnhide
tools.description: Unhide the given player's leaderboard scores from the given application. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console.

tools.name: scores.gamesManagementScoresReset
tools.description: Resets scores for the leaderboard with the given ID for the currently authenticated player. This method is only accessible to whitelisted tester accounts for your application.

tools.name: scores.gamesManagementScoresResetAll
tools.description: Resets all scores for all leaderboards for the currently authenticated players. This method is only accessible to whitelisted tester accounts for your application.

tools.name: scores.gamesManagementScoresResetAllForAllPlayers
tools.description: Resets scores for all draft leaderboards for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console.

tools.name: scores.gamesManagementScoresResetForAllPlayers
tools.description: Resets scores for the leaderboard with the given ID for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console. Only draft leaderboards can be reset.

tools.name: scores.gamesManagementScoresResetMultipleForAllPlayers
tools.description: Resets scores for the leaderboards with the given IDs for all players. This method is only available to user accounts for your developer console. Only draft leaderboards may be reset.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
